enrichment.summary: Kyle records a replacement vlog for November 22nd after forgetting to unplug his earphones in a prior take. He shares an update on his Google Earth mapping project covering ancient Rome, describing his excitement after discovering the Forma Urbis Romae (the Severan marble plan of Rome) and the Aurelian Wall, while acknowledging he may burn out before finishing due to the city's scale.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Super excited but realistic he'll burn out before finishing due to Rome's size

stances.topic: Forma Urbis Romae as a source
stances.position: Reliable enough to reconstruct ancient Rome's streets and buildings despite being partially recovered
The best and most developed city Google has built in 3D
Wishes Google's automated 3D-from-photo technology were available to regular users
Goals to finish Google Earthing both cities by end of winter
